description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a robust, industrial design. The barrels are arranged side-by-side, both featuring a dark metallic finish with subtle gold or brass accents at the breech and along the barrel bands. The grip is a classic pistol style, made of wood with a smooth, ergonomic curve and visible fasteners. The receiver and action area are reinforced, with a prominent pump mechanism beneath the barrels, indicating a pump-action system. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall build is sturdy, with a blend of metal and wood materials, making it suitable for rugged urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barreled shotgun with a wooden pistol grip, metallic barrels, and a visible pump-action mechanism. The design features gold accents and a robust, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels side-by-side, the pump mechanism below, and the circular muzzle openings.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the wooden pistol grip, metallic receiver, gold accents, and the full length of the barrels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, the alignment of the barrels, and the pump handle beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and pump mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
